english: Lord of all beings, destroyer of sins, the supreme Lord
Wearing the skin of the elephant-king, the most excellent one
With the Ganga waters gleaming in his matted locks
I remember the one great Mahadeva, the enemy of Cupid
The great Lord, lord of gods, destroyer of the enemies of gods
The all-pervading Lord of the Universe, adorned with sacred ash
roman: Vibhum Vishva Natham vibhutya anga bhusham

english: Three-eyed Virupaksha whose three eyes are moon, sun and fire
I praise the eternally blissful Lord with five faces
The Lord of mountains, Lord of Ganas, with a blue throat
Mounted on the bull-king, of a form beyond all qualities
Being itself, radiant, with a body adorned with sacred ash
With Bhavani as his consort — I worship the five-faced Lord
